steps.title: Determine the required meaning
steps.content: The researchers' data — that the basking shark runs warmer than surrounding water — directly contradicts the prior classification as a "full ectotherm." The blank describes a position that evidence has made impossible to defend.

steps.title: Test each word
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'inconsolable': Means unable to be comforted — applies to people feeling grief, not to scientific positions. ✗
  • Choice B — 'untenable': Means unable to be maintained or defended in the face of evidence — exactly what happens when new data undercuts a classification. ✓
  • Choice C — 'unequivocal': Means leaving no doubt or ambiguity — would strengthen the position, not undermine it. ✗
  • Choice D — 'unanticipated': Means not expected — describes a reaction to the finding, not the status of the classification itself. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
